payload.label: window
payload.short_description: white slatted blinds framed by curtains
payload.long_description: Full-height interior rectangular window with closed white horizontal slatted blinds (likely vinyl/plastic), framed by dark blue/black curtains left and right and partially occluded at the lower-left by a wooden nightstand; light softly filters through the slats; approximate distance from camera ~2.5 m.
